dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Are you okay?! You were corrupted, I had to fight this awful version of you.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: I...couldn't control myself. Everything came back to me. This pendant, you gave it to me. It's the reason I'm here, right?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: ...It's one of the reasons, yes. I'm so sorry, Echo. I didn't want you to find out this way.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: No, I'm sorry. I should've died in the forest instead of you.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Don't say that! How could say such an awful thing, Echo?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: You were the light of everyone's lives, Chime. I'm a fly on the wall. The world was a brighter place with you in it. I made no real difference.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: You made all the difference to me, Echo! I was only ever able to smile because you were keeping me from falling apart!

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: Anyone could've been there for you...

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: NOBODY was there for me like you were. Why do you think I gave you that pendant? You mean so much to me and many others, Echo. Please, try to see that...

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: You're right. I'm so sorry, Chime. It took so much for me to see. Now that we're together again, can we go home?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: If you mean back to the original world, the one before the Astral Plane, I'm afraid we can't...

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: We can, however, move on to the next one, together. Wherever it may be. Are you ready?
